title: The Vanishing of Paige Moore

scenes.text: A teenager disappears during a routine outing, leaving her family devastated.
Paige Moore vanished in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma, in 2012.
She was last seen on July 12, during a seemingly normal day.
Despite searches and media coverage, no trace has ever been found.
scenes.label: CASE COLD

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 Broken Arrow, USA - 2012. Teenager Paige Moore vanished without any leads, prompting an extensive search that failed to turn up anything. Follow for daily mysteries!
